notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Adolis García reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Jake Burger. Adolis García to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Andrew McCutchen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew McCutchen flies out to right fielder Adolis García.

notableEvents.label: Josh Jung GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Jung grounds into a double play, second baseman Bryson Stott to shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Bryce Harper. Josh Smith out at 2nd. Josh Jung out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrew McCutchen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew McCutchen flies out to left fielder Brandon Marsh.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Jhoan Duran. Brandon Nimmo scores. Wyatt Langford to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Andrew McCutchen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew McCutchen singles on a ground ball to left fielder Brandon Marsh. Wyatt Langford scores. Andrew McCutchen to 2nd.
